title: Jared Bean Resume
text:
Email: jbean42@byui.edu | 986.231.8940 | LinkedIn


Bachelor of Science in Economics
Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID
2021 - 2025
- Societies: Economics Society, Data Science Society
- Scholarships: Moral & Ethical Leadership - Ira & Mary Lou Fulton, BYU Idaho Grant
- GPA: 3.6
- Emphasis: Data Science, Accounting



Research Assistant
Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID
January 2023 – June 2024
- Used R Studios to draw conclusions from data with regression models and graphs. - Created tables in LaTeX to inform teachers of important statistical teaching information.
Tutor
Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID
September 2023 – June 2024
- Increased 20+ students’ comprehension by teaching Micro and Macro Economic fundamentals. - Enhanced students’ ability to study by teaching study skills and habits.
Bookkeeper
Richard L. Joliet CPA, Prescott, AZ
July 2022 – September 2022
- Accelerated speed by 15% for client financial statement completion. - Outlined easy-to-read summaries of expenses and revenue with QuickBooks and Excel. - Organized financial statements and tax returns for clients.
Patient Manager
Statewide Home Health Staffing, Prescott, AZ
February 2021 – April 2021
- Streamlined communication between patients and the company. - Arranged and provided training for employee onboarding materials and equipment.
Full Time Volunteer
The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, San Jose, California & Chile Concepción
March 2019 – February 2021
- Taught classes of 25+ students English with a pass rate of over 90%. - Attained fluency in Spanish to communicate concepts and ideas with classes. - Learned to connect with people from various cultural backgrounds.




Data Analytical skills: OLS Regressions, Logit Regressions, Econometrics, Statistics, LaTeX.
Coding languages: Python, R-Studio, VBA, Excel.
Other: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office Suite, fluent in Spanish.
